answers: Start a blog: choose a niche, get hosting (Bluehost/Hostinger), install WordPress, write valuable content, and be consistent.
Blogging tips: write for your reader (not yourself), use headings and short paragraphs, include images, and optimize for SEO.
Make money: ads (Google AdSense), affiliate marketing, sponsored posts, selling products/courses. Needs 10K+ monthly visitors.
Blog shuru: WordPress use koro, niche choose koro (je topic e tumi expert), niyomito likho, ar SEO shikho.
